positive: An intricate, symmetrical mandala-style composition featuring bioluminescent flora and abstract celestial elements. The primary subject is a central cluster of glowing, stylized flowers and leaves that radiate outward, forming perfect radial symmetry. The color palette must be limited to deep midnight indigo, vibrant cyan, electric magenta, and subtle glowing teal. Use a 'dark fantasy' aesthetic blended with clean 'Art Nouveau' geometry. The composition must maintain high contrast against a solid, deep space background, ensuring clean silhouettes perfect for screen printing on apparel. Lighting should be dramatic, emanating only from the glowing flora, creating sharp, crystalline edges and depth.
negative: blurry, noisy, low contrast, monochrome, gradient, realistic human, text, signature, watermark, logo, artifact, deformed, extra limbs, ugly, bad anatomy, overexposed, jpeg artifacts
